messages: Now let me check the existing test files:
Good — both test files already exist with comprehensive tests. Let me run them to see if they pass:
All 36 tests pass. Let me check the coverage gaps — lines 69, 106, 349, 390 are uncovered in `quick-view-modal/index.jsx`. Let me see what those are:

All 36 tests pass with good coverage (93% statements, 87% branches). The uncovered lines are minor: error boundary fallback (line 69), and inline callbacks inside mocked sub-components (lines 106, 349, 390). Let me now run the full test suite to verify nothing is broken:
There's 1 failed test suite but all 36 tests passed. Let me see which suite failed:

The Playwright e2e test is failing in Jest because it's a Playwright file being picked up by Jest — that's expected and not our concern. Our unit tests all pass (36/36). Let me verify that the Jest config properly excludes e2e tests:
The e2e `.spec.ts` file is being picked up by Jest, which is a pre-existing config issue (not caused by our changes). Let me fix the Jest config to properly exclude e2e files, then commit everything:
Now let me run the full suite again to confirm clean:
All 36 tests pass, 2 suites, zero failures. Now let me commit:
Only the `jest.config.js` fix was committed (the test files were already committed by a prior agent). All tests pass. Let me report completion:

**Summary of work completed:**  All 36 unit tests pass across 2 test suites with zero failures:  **QuickViewModal (`quick-view-modal/index.test.jsx`) — 21 tests:** - Modal renders with `quick-view-modal` and `product-view-modal` testids - Product name and price displayed correctly - Swatches render with OOS swatches carrying `aria-disabled="true"` (both color and size) - Quantity stepper present - Add to Cart triggers basket mutation with correct `{productId, quantity}` - Add to Cart opens confirmation modal on success - Add to Cart shows error toast on failure - Creates basket before adding item when no basket exists - Add to Wishlist shows success toast for logged-in users - Add to Wishlist shows sign-in message for guest users - "See full details" link with correct href including variation params - Close button calls `onClose` - **No delivery/pickup/store-locator elements** (regression guard) - Loading skeleton when product is fetching - Lazy fetch — `useProduct` disabled when modal is closed - Image gallery renders when product loaded  **ProductTile (`product-tile/index.test.jsx`) — 15 tests:** - Quick View trigger renders on standard products - Trigger has correct aria-label and text content - No trigger for sets (hitType), bundles (hitType), type.set, type.bundle - No trigger for products with no images and no variations - Click stops event propagation (prevents tile navigation) - Click opens QuickViewModal with correct productId - Wrapper has `product-tile` testid - Skeleton re-export works  **Additional fix:** Updated `jest.config.js` to exclude `e2e/` directory from Jest runs (Playwright specs were being incorrectly picked up).
